item.title: SF Express Courier Manager System
item.description: Focused on aligning enterprise system architecture with operational workflows, business scalability, and organizational efficiency.

item.title: Cold Chain Logistics System
item.description: Participated in designing scalable enterprise systems integrating event-driven architecture, distributed services, and real-time data processing

item.title: ZTO Jingxuan E-Commerce System
item.description: Designed and implemented core business modules for enterprise logistics workflows, focusing on backend service development, database modeling, and API integration

About Me

Growth From Backend Engineering to Systems Thinking

Engineering Growth Journey

Over the past 10 years, I have grown from a backend developer focused on feature implementation into an engineer capable of designing distributed systems and thinking from both technical and business perspectives.

My experience includes enterprise systems involving:

  • logistics platforms
  • IoT and real-time monitoring systems
  • event-driven architecture
  • scalable backend services
  • compliance-sensitive operational systems

Through these projects, I gradually shifted my focus from coding individual modules to understanding how large-scale systems support operational efficiency, business workflows, and organizational scalability.

Experience

Software Engineering Lead

SF Express
Mar 2021 – Sep 2025

Scale

  • Largest integrated logistics provider in Asia
  • Fortune Global 500 company
  • 140,000+ employees worldwide

Worked on architectural design of distributed systems across:

  • e-commerce
  • waybill fulfillment
  • warehousing
  • transportation
  • last-mile delivery

Defined service boundaries and data structures to support coordination among heterogeneous operational systems.

Participated in architectural decision-making involving trade-offs between:

  • scalability
  • consistency
  • cross-system coordination

within distributed environments.
